outline.title: Las 28 Doctrinas Tecnológicas
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/comparativo_artifact_killer.png - This image is a detailed table comparing 'Antes' and 'Después' values for various parameters, which directly relates to the 28 doctrines and their specific configurations.
